title: The Aftermath of Egghead
description: On pages 10–12, this part focuses on Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12, Vegapunk, York as Egghead’s aftermath reshapes the world: Vegapunk’s truth spreads, Saturn faces consequences, and the route toward Elbaf opens.
scene: Egghead’s aftermath reshapes the world: Vegapunk’s truth spreads, Saturn faces consequences, and the route toward Elbaf opens.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There is one other thing we must safeguard...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Our CLOUD-LOFT technology to manufacture...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Artificial Island clouds!! It may be pivotal in saving humanity in the near future!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Stella, what are you doin' here?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Oh, is that you, york?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: You know, same old, same old.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If our experiments to optimize the mother flame...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Allow THIS thing to move again...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It'd be a big breakthrough in creating our ideal energy source.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: That's right!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It'd be amazing if we achieve that soon!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Right...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can only pray it never gets perfected.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Two days before the present

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Go ahead and speak now!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: The recording has begun.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Ahem.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: AHA... mic check, mic check!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: attention, world... Hello, there.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Err... this is Dr. vegapunk...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The world's greatest and most humble scientific genius.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What we said will come as a big shock, right?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Maybe, but everyone has a right to know the truth!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No one will ever expect the transponder snail to be hidden here!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My death will trigger the message to be sent out worldwide.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We need to ensure that no one finds out till it's too late.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Any abnormality in our behavior could be a tip-off that spoils our plans.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: erasing our own memories is the safest bet.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: That said, there will be consequences...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We'll lose all memories related to this matter.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The fact that York stole the mother flame...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The fact that our lives are currently at stake.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We'll have to suffer through all those bombs all over again!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Indeed.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The fear we feel for our lives will be brand new to us!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But we have put our countermeasures in place!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Even if things go sideways...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Hehe...

summary: This part advances the Egghead Aftermath through 39 cleaned dialogue beats, emphasizing the core conflict, character stakes, and transition into the next movement of the story.
